title: salix nummularia var. stenophylla
intro: Salix nummularia var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaved willow, is a variety of the willow plant that belongs to the Salicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and pain, due to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix nummularia var. stenophylla include reducing inflammation, relieving headaches and menstrual cramps, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, and it has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its therapeutic properties.
